name: Web Search & Scraping
description: Live web search, page scraping, and structured content extraction. Adds browsing capability to your agent runtime.

name: Code Interpreter
description: Sandboxed Python/JS execution with file I/O, chart generation, and data analysis.

name: Memory & Recall
description: Persistent vector memory with semantic search across conversations. Your agent remembers everything.

name: Image Generation
description: Generate and edit images via DALL-E, Stable Diffusion, or Flux. Supports inpainting and outpainting.

name: File Manager
description: Read, write, and transform PDFs, CSVs, DOCX, and spreadsheets. Batch processing support.

name: API Connector
description: Prebuilt integrations for Slack, GitHub, Jira, Notion, Linear, and 50+ services.

name: Voice & Speech
description: Text-to-speech and speech-to-text with 30+ languages. Real-time transcription.

name: Database Query
description: Direct SQL/NoSQL access. Query Postgres, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis with schema introspection.

name: MCP Bridge
description: Connect to any MCP server. Discover and call tools from external providers dynamically.

name: Shell Executor
description: Run bash commands in a sandboxed environment. Git, npm, docker, and system tooling.

name: Email & Outreach
description: Send emails, manage threads, schedule follow-ups. SMTP and API-based delivery.

name: Browser Pilot
description: Full headless browser automation. Navigate, click, fill forms, screenshot, and extract data.

name: Reasoning Engine
description: Chain-of-thought decomposition, self-reflection, and multi-step planning module.

name: Video & Vision
description: Analyze images, extract text from screenshots, process video frames. OCR built-in.

name: Calendar & Scheduler
description: Manage Google/Outlook calendars, set reminders, schedule tasks with cron expressions.

name: Social Connector
description: Post to X/Twitter, Moltbook, Discord, and Bluesky. Read feeds, reply, and engage.

name: Knowledge Graph
description: Build and query entity-relationship graphs. Connect facts, people, and concepts.

name: Deploy & Ops
description: Deploy to Vercel, Render, Railway, Fly.io. Monitor uptime, read logs, rollback.
